LAUNCHING TODAY

First 5 apps are free.

. If it's one of these five, it's built and live tonight — completely free.

01 / 05

AI Chatbot

A chatbot that answers your clients' questions 24/7. WhatsApp + web. Powered by Claude. Never misses an enquiry.

02 / 05

Booking System

Online scheduling with WhatsApp reminders. Patients pick slots. You get a clean daily agenda dashboard.

03 / 05

Social Media Manager

20 posts/month, scheduled across all platforms. AI writes, designs, posts, and replies to comments.

04 / 05

Lead Capture CRM

Every enquiry captured, qualified, and followed up automatically. Never lose a lead again.

05 / 05

Email Automation

Auto-reply, priority triage, and follow-up sequences. Your inbox managed before you open it.

Claim your free app →

FOR THE MEDICAL INDUSTRY

Built for aesthetic clinics & healthcare

Every feature respects South African healthcare regulations. POPIA compliance built in from day one. Patient data stays yours.

📅

Patient Booking Systems

Online scheduling with automated WhatsApp reminders. Reduce no-shows by up to 40%. Patients book 24/7 — your staff focuses on care.

↓40% no-shows
🔒

POPIA Compliant

South African data law baked into every layer. Patient consent flows, secure storage, audit trails. Always governance-ready.

100% compliant
💬

WhatsApp Patient Comms

AI-powered WhatsApp for appointment reminders, intake forms, and follow-ups. Conversational AI that feels human.

↑80% response rate
📊

Clinical Dashboards

Real-time theatre utilisation, patient flow, stock management. The numbers your governance team needs, live.

Real-time data
🧠

AI Medical Triage

Upload a photo of a concern. AI flags urgency. Streamlined workflow for your clinical team.

AI triage
📋

Digital Intake Forms

Patients complete forms on their phone before arriving. No paper. Instantly synced to your EMR.

Paperless
THE FLOW

From idea to live product in 4 steps

📋
STEP 1

Submit Your Idea

Drop a voice note. Paste a Figma link. Or just type what you need.

🧠
STEP 2

AI Reads & Understands

Your brief is analysed and turned into a full Product Requirement Document.

🔨
STEP 3

CodeRabbit Reviews & Builds

AI agents write code. CodeRabbit reviews every PR before it merges.

🚀
STEP 4

Live in Production

Your product is deployed, tested, and live. You get the link tonight.

🐰

CodeRabbit AI Code Review

Every pull request reviewed before it merges.

✓ Active on this build
0%

booking.tsx → api/appointments.ts → schema.prisma → ...

booking.tsxTypeScript ✓ Approved

Solid React patterns. Consider adding loading skeletons for the calendar view.

api/appointments.tsNode.js ↻ Changes requested

This endpoint lacks rate limiting. Also consider Redis caching for frequently accessed slots.

schema.prismaPrisma ✓ Approved

Good use of relations. Add a unique constraint on appointment(time_slot_id, date) to prevent double-booking.

Voice note, link, or typed description. Pick your lane.

What you receive

🖥️

Production Codebase

Clean TypeScript. Next.js + Prisma + Tailwind. Hosted on Vercel, live tonight.

📋

PRD Document

Full Product Requirement Document. Spec-first process. You approve before we build.

🐰

CodeRabbit Review

Every PR reviewed by AI. Security and performance flags before merge.

📊

Live Dashboard

Real-time build progress. Watch agents working in the space station.

🔄

Unlimited Revisions

Request changes, big or small. Your brief is central — edits always included.

🌐

Custom Domain Ready

Your product deployed to your own domain. SSL, CDN, monitoring configured.
